scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@ssm/domain && npm run build --workspace=@ssm/database && npm run build --workspace=@ssm/api && npm run build --workspace=@ssm/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@ssm/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ssm/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ssm/database && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ssm/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ssm/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace=@ssm/domain && npm run test --workspace=@ssm/domain && npm run test --workspace=@ssm/database && npm run test --workspace=@ssm/api && npm run test --workspace=@ssm/web
